from django.db import models

class Receta(models.Model):
    nombre = models.CharField(max_length=200, blank=False)
    ingredientes = models.TextField(blank=False)
    preparacion = models.TextField(blank=False)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.nombre

What is a black hole?

A black hole is a gravitational well so deep that even light cannot escape. They can be formed when a giant gas-giant star collapses over itself.
